description: Explorium provides external B2B data infrastructure for business and prospect search, enrichment, and event tracking. Its products are aimed at powering GTM workflows and AI agents with structured company and contact data.
summary: Explorium exposes a credentialed REST API at `https://api.explorium.ai/v1` plus MCP servers for AgentSource (`https://mcp.explorium.ai/mcp`, with documented SSE sibling) and Vibe Prospecting (`https://vibeprospecting.explorium.ai/mcp`, OAuth-protected).
